alignments.wiki_text: I… am working on Longmont Potion Castle 16. [coughs] [delay]I’m, uh… up to about 25, 30 minutes, so I’m doing that. And, ya know, it used to take me… three, four years to complete an album. And I will remind you, my good man, that these are, essentially, double, triple albums. Especially considering the length of the records that are coming out now.So… Yeah. Four, five years, it would take, often times. I hope seriously that it doesn’t take anywhere near that long. But I am working on that every chance I get. I want it to be really good.But otherwise, I just look forward to… talking to people about this movie. I mean, it’s so new, I wanna see how much enjoyment I can possibly get out of it.—
